zh.Cambridge, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay,: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可坎布利其
zh.Kildonan, North Ayrshire, Scotland, Unit: 英國蘇格蘭阿吉爾 安德 布特吉爾多南
zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Eccles於1614年出生在英國蘇格蘭阿吉爾 安德 布特吉爾多南時，他的父親John Eccles41歲，母親Janet Cathcart38歲。他於1677年4月4日與Susannah Carter在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可坎布利其結婚。他去世於1697年3月10日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可坎布利其享年83歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Eccles于1614年出生在英国苏格兰阿吉爾 安德 布特吉爾多南时，他的父亲John Eccles41岁，母亲Janet Cathcart38岁。他于1677年4月4日与Susannah Carter在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可坎布利其结婚。他去世于1697年3月10日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可坎布利其享年83岁。

nameMeanings.name: Eccles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from Eccles in Lancashire, or possibly from any of several other places so named in Kent, Norfolk, Berwickshire, and Dumfriesshire, from British eglēs ‘Romano-British Christian church’ (from Latin ecclesia, Greek ekklēsia ‘gathering, assembly’). Such places would have been the sites of notable pre-Anglo-Saxon churches or Christian places of communal worship.

variants.name: Exley
meanings: English (Yorkshire): habitational name from Exley in Southowram (Yorkshire), from British eglēs ‘Romano-British Christian church’ (from Latin ecclesia, Greek ekklēsia ‘gathering, assembly’) + Old English lēah ‘woodland clearing’. Compare Eccles .
Americanized form of South German   Oechsle  .

variants.name: Echols
meanings: Altered form of English   Eccles   and possibly also of German   Eckels  .

variants.name: Eckles
meanings: English: variant of   Eccles  . This form is now rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Eccles was born in 1614, in Kildonan, Argyll and Bute, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, John Eccles, was 41 and his mother, Janet Cathcart, was 38. He married Susannah Carter on 4 April 1677, in Cambridge, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. He died on 10 March 1697, in Cambridge, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 83.

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Eccles(이)가 1614년 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 앤드 부트 킬도난에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Eccles(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Janet Cathcart(은)는 38세였다. 그는 1677년 4월 4일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 캄브리지에서 Susannah Carter(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1697년 3월 10일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 캄브리지에서 83세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Kildonan, North Ayrshire, Scotland, Unit: каилдонан, аргилл анд бут, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Eccles родился в 1614 г. в местности каилдонан, аргилл анд бут, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Eccles было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Janet Cathcart, 38. Он женился на женщине по имени Susannah Carter 4 апреля 1677 г. в местности камбридж, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. Он умер 10 марта 1697 г. в местности камбридж, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 83 лет.
